about.heading: Oscar Sanchez — Editorial Wedding Photographer in Ciudad Juárez
paragraphs: I'm Oscar Sanchez, a photographer based in Ciudad Juárez. I specialize in editorial wedding photography, portraits, and couple sessions. I understand that choosing the person who will document your memories is an act of faith. That's why my commitment from the very first conversation is to give you confidence and absolute peace of mind.

My work combines technical attention to detail with the artistic sensitivity needed to capture what matters most: people, connections, and moments worth preserving. I don't direct every second, but create space for you to live your day freely while I document the essential with editorial intention.

I believe in wedding photography that feels natural, elegant, and deeply human. My main promise isn't just to deliver aesthetically beautiful images, but to transform today's emotion into tangible visual legacy that lets you relive the moment forever.

From our first conversation, my goal is to give you clarity, guidance, and peace of mind so you can enjoy the process without stress. I want you to live each experience knowing that every irreplaceable instant is in safe hands.

testimonials.author: Ketzia & Marcos
testimonials.text: Oscar captured moments we didn't even notice were happening. Seeing our photos was reliving our wedding completely. His style is super natural and made us feel really comfortable.

testimonials.text: We didn't want typical boring posed photos. Oscar understood perfectly what we were looking for. Our photos from the prep and the party look like they came straight out of a movie. Highly recommended!

instructions.title: How the giveaway works
items: Fill out the form with real details about your wedding.
Share your style and why you'd like to win this session.
We review entries and select couples based on compatibility and availability.
The winning couple receives a direct WhatsApp message to schedule their session.

whatsapp.title: After sending the form
steps: WhatsApp will open with your message ready to send.
We review your request and respond in the same chat.
If you prefer, you can copy the message and send it manually.

faqs.question: What's the difference between editorial and traditional wedding photography?
faqs.answer: Editorial photography captures the genuine narrative of your wedding with a storytelling approach. Each photo tells part of your story—authentic moments and details that matter, not uncomfortable posed shots.

faqs.question: What does wedding coverage in Ciudad Juárez include?
faqs.answer: Full coverage from preparations through reception, focusing on genuine moments, elegant details, and your connection. A process designed so you can fully enjoy every second without stress.

faqs.question: What's the process to hire your services?
faqs.answer: Contact me via WhatsApp or the contact form, we discuss your vision and special needs, confirm date availability, and I provide a clear proposal with investment, coverage details, and next steps.

faqs.question: How do you preserve our wedding story?
faqs.answer: Through narrative photography that captures authentic emotions, your connection as a couple, and unique moments from your day. Each image is a scene in the movie of your story.

faqs.question: What cities do you serve besides Ciudad Juárez?
faqs.answer: My focus is Ciudad Juárez, though I can consider special requests. If your wedding is here, I have availability and deep knowledge of the best venues.
